scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build:workspace: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.install:chrome: pnpm --filter @workspace/scraper exec puppeteer browsers install chrome
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./packages/scraper" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.desktop:build: pnpm run desktop:prepare && pnpm --filter @workspace/desktop run build:dmg
